Theorem ssidd 3959
Description: Weakening of ssid 3958. (Contributed by BJ, 1-Sep-2022.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
ssidd ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 ⊆ 𝐴)
Proof of Theorem ssidd
StepHypRef Expression
1 ssid 3958 . 2 ⊢ 𝐴 ⊆ 𝐴
21a1i 11 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 ⊆ 𝐴)
